findings.summary: Tracked diff stays within web UI and UI tests; no runtime, command adapter, allowlist, or live server files changed.
Row click and detail button open the drawer only; no command dispatch is attached to opening details.
Account actions pass only account_id through the bounded UI action payload path.
Disabled account actions render as disabled controls without command listeners.
Account confirmation preflight renders current account id, pool/lifecycle, requested action, and refresh expectation.
Account last error and timeline fields pass through explicit redaction helpers before rendering.
UI tests cover drawer, redaction, confirmation preflight, and button availability behavior.
